center.name: Alexandre Prigogine
center.summary: Alexandre Prigogine是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Albertine owlet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2022 |title=Glaucidium albertinum |article-number=e.T22689310A208604278 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2022-1.RLTS.T22689310A208604278.en}} | status2 = CITES_A2 | status2_system = CITES | status2_ref = | taxon = Glaucidium albertinum | authority = Prigogine, 1983 | synonyms = }} The Albertine owlet (Glaucidium albertinum) or Prigogine's owlet, is a small species of small owl in the family Strigidae, native to the Albertine Rift montane forests

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |year=2022 |title=Glaucidium albertinum |article-number=e.T22689310A208604278 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2022-1.RLTS.T22689310A208604278.en}} | status2 = CITES_A2 | status2_system = CITES | status2_ref = | taxon = Glaucidium albertinum | authority = Prigogine, 1983 | synonyms = }} The Albertine owlet (Glaucidium albertinum) or Prigogine's owlet, is a small species of small owl in the family Strigidae, native to the Albertine Rift montane forests
